headlines: It's an AI web, and we're just rats in the walls
AI customers are coming around to the idea that small is beautiful
Irish datacenters now guzzle 23% of the country's electricity
Slothful summer app lets you scroll simply by tilting your head
crew_quote: "With no power and no weather, it's like we're just floating in a cosmic curry pot, waiting for the AI to serve us up some tiny, beautiful misery!"
